steps.title: Identify the probability formula
steps.content: For a random selection, we need the probability of selecting a button with a flaw. The probability of any event is the ratio of favorable outcomes to total possible outcomes.

steps.title: Apply the formula with the given values
steps.content:
From the problem: 31 out of every 100 buttons have a flaw.
$$P(\text{flaw}) = \frac{31}{100}$$
That is the correct answer.
